title: Dynamic Crosshair Compat
body:
This is an add-on to my mod [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) that adds compatibility for some mods.

**I do not plan to maintain this mod for (Neo)Forge.**

If you have requests for mods to be supported, please open an issue on Github! The same applies if you notice inconsistencies. I mostly play vanilla myself, so I will not notice.

You may refer to the first column in these lists to see which mods have explicit support:
- [1.20 - 1.20.1](https://github.com/Crendgrim/DynamicCrosshairCompat/blob/main/versions/1.20.1/supported_mods.csv)
- [1.20.3 - 1.20.4](https://github.com/Crendgrim/DynamicCrosshairCompat/blob/main/versions/1.20.4/supported_mods.csv)
- [1.20.5 - 1.20.6](https://github.com/Crendgrim/DynamicCrosshairCompat/blob/main/versions/1.20.6/supported_mods.csv)
- [1.21 - 1.21.1](https://github.com/Crendgrim/DynamicCrosshairCompat/blob/main/versions/1.21.1/supported_mods.csv)
- [1.21.3](https://github.com/Crendgrim/DynamicCrosshairCompat/blob/main/versions/1.21.3/supported_mods.csv)


Any mod that only adds simple blocks or items (such as food) might work fine out of the box, without the need for this compatibility mod.
